name: No-Mix Meat Loaf (Makes Its Own Gravy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Form ground beef into a loaf about 3 inches high on a large sheet of aluminum foil.
2. Sprinkle the onion soup mix evenly over the top of the loaf.
3. Spread the cream of mushroom soup from the can over the top of the loaf.
4. Wrap the foil loosely but securely around the loaf, sealing it tightly.
5. Place the wrapped meat loaf on a baking sheet or in a shallow pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
